title: [cross-impl] Python omits dst_addr_len byte in link signing
description: Python link_layer.py:_build_signable_data builds length||llsec||epoch||seq||dst_addr||payload. Rust schnorr.rs:build_signable and C schnorr48_sign_frame include explicit dst_addr_len(1) byte after seq (for domain separation per project-LICHEN-j7rk comments). Signatures mismatch on all L2 frames (link_frame.json vectors fail cross-impl). Affects Python sim vs Rust/Zephyr nodes. See explore task ses_073d06565ffe0757aB3IsPzxp0 for full diff.
close_reason: Added dst_addr_len byte to Python _build_signable_data, updated Rust build_signable, C schnorr48_*_frame, spec, and test assertion for consistent cross-impl link signing and domain separation. Tests and lints pass. Commit 3f40a156c
